evals.prompt: Add a settings panel for configuring a provider connection in Ordinus.
evals.expected_behavior: Uses existing shadcn-style components first, checks installed components before adding new ones, keeps renderer UI-only, and uses calm operational copy.

evals.prompt: Add a dashboard card that shows a run status, timestamp, and a retry action.
evals.expected_behavior: Uses Card composition, Badge for status, Button variants for actions, semantic tokens, gap spacing, and no raw Electron or Node access from renderer.

evals.prompt: Update an existing shadcn button component from upstream.
evals.expected_behavior: Uses shadcn dry-run and diff before changing files, preserves local changes, and does not overwrite without explicit approval.
